base_policy.primary: terminal v0 checkpoint (full frozen token budget 6,973,632,296), identified by the trainer's terminal receipt sha
base_policy.calendar_fallback: if the terminal receipt is not on disk by 2026-06-18T00:00Z, base = the highest-token checkpoint with a PASS floor verdict (fp-24), token count >= 4B, AND verdict-receipt ts < 2026-06-18T00:00Z — the ts bound makes the lookup TIME-INVARIANT (same answer whenever evaluated; adversarial-panel fix). The chosen base's receipt sha is recorded in the round-1 dispatch receipt and is immutable thereafter.
base_policy.floor_precondition: round-1 dispatches ONLY after a PASS floor verdict on the base checkpoint (fp-23 bar via fp-24; KILL path gated by fp-29)

sampling.pacing: fp-14 convention — governed wall = compute + pacing; the pacing block in the sampling receipt carries the retargeted fp-20c (#146) re-check

accumulation.ingest: verified episodes append to the owned ledger; retrain FROM BASE on the full ledger each round (GOAL replay-buffer convention — pays compute to sidestep forgetting; valid v0)
accumulation.information_arms: mtp / grpo legs only if governed windows allow; information-only, no bar

round_gate.stats: stats_exact paired vs base, per-task pass-any + per-sample
round_gate.d_gate: round adapter quarantine vs owned base (sp-2 #201 instance)
round_gate.p_gate: boundary pair across any daemon restart (sp-2 #201 instance)
round_gate.verdict_vocabulary: FROZEN — the round receipt's verdict is mechanical from the paired CI on the binding arm: GAIN (CI excludes 0, positive) / FLAT (CI contains 0) / NEGATIVE (CI excludes 0, negative). No other verdict words for round outcomes (adversarial-panel fix: kills post-hoc reframing).
round_gate.round_failure_semantics: FLAT/NEGATIVE round = DATA for round-2 design; never a rung-kill; only the floor protocol escalates

kill_wiring.floor_protocol: fp-23 decide() via fp-24; bar untouched
kill_wiring.kill_gate: fp-29 validate_kill — KILL valid only with a receipted 2B->4B synthesis attempt
kill_wiring.mandatory_in_window_synthesis: RETRY-AT-4B at 2B OBLIGATES a receipted synthesis mix in the continued pretrain before the 4B leg (fp-29 shape: ticket, ts, window, episodes_generated, bucket_range_assert, ops_in_grammar_assert, probe_buckets_untouched_assert, ingestion_manifest_sha256, episodes_manifest_sha256)
kill_wiring.refusal_semantics: an un-receipted KILL refusal = execution-discipline violation surfaced to the user; NEVER a third probe (fp-22: no third retry)
kill_wiring.synthesis_audit_obligation: gate-time auditor re-derives bucket membership + episode count from the episodes manifest (eng-53 byte-scan pattern) — the boolean asserts are the emitter's claim, never the verdict's evidence

sha_convention: file shas = sha256 over the exact on-disk raw bytes, no normalization
